title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Canara Bank Capital India family as a Investment Banker in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
